name: Legal Data Addition ⚖️ about: Request or provide new legal sections to add to our knowledge base title: '[DATA] Add [IPC/CrPC Section X]' labels: data, documentation assignees: ''

Which Law/Code are you proposing to add?
(e.g., Indian Penal Code, Code of Criminal Procedure, Indian Evidence Act, New Criminal Laws (BNS, BNSS, BSA))

Specific Sections or Chapters
List the specific sections you want to add (e.g., Sections 405-409 regarding Criminal Breach of Trust).

Proposed Text (If you have it ready)
If you have the formatted text ready for ipc_data.txt, please paste it below using our standard format:

Section [Number]: [Title]
[Description text...]


Why is this data important?
Briefly explain why adding this specific data will improve the AI's analysis capabilities.
